mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ht_tasks_perform( id, instruction_type, instruction, number, org_id, concentrator_code, device_id, meter_num, meter_id, meter_arc_code, status, instruction_status, create_time, create_by, dtu_num, chan_num ) SELECT CAST(CONV(SUBSTRING(REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), 18, 14), 16, 10) AS SIGNED), 4, 0, 0, a.org_id, a.concentrator_code, a.id, a.meter_num, a.archive_id, a.meter_arc_code, 0, 0, NOW(), #{createBy}, a.dtu_num, a.chan_num FROM pr_heat_valve_archive a LEFT JOIN pr_options_heat b ON b.org_id = a.org_id WHERE a.org_id = #{orgId} AND a.dtu_num = #{dtuNum} AND a.is_changed = '0'

INSERT INTO ht_tasks_perform( id, instruction_type, instruction, number, org_id, concentrator_code, device_id, meter_num, meter_id, meter_arc_code, status, instruction_status, create_time, create_by, dtu_num, chan_num ) SELECT CAST(CONV(SUBSTRING(REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), 18, 14), 16, 10) AS SIGNED), 4, 0, 0, a.org_id, a.concentrator_code, a.id, a.meter_num, a.archive_id, a.meter_arc_code, 0, 0, NOW(), #{createBy}, a.dtu_num, a.chan_num FROM pr_heat_unit_valve_archive a LEFT JOIN pr_options_heat b ON b.org_id = a.org_id WHERE a.org_id = #{orgId} AND a.dtu_num = #{dtuNum} AND a.is_changed = '0'

INSERT INTO ht_tasks_perform( id, instruction_type, instruction, number, org_id, concentrator_code, device_id, meter_num, meter_id, meter_arc_code, status, instruction_status, create_time, create_by, imei, dtu_num, chan_num ) SELECT CAST(CONV(SUBSTRING(REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), 18, 14), 16, 10) AS SIGNED), 4, 0, 0, a.org_id, a.concentrator_code, a.id, a.meter_num, a.archive_id, a.meter_arc_code, 0, 0, NOW(), #{createBy}, a.imei_num, a.dtu_num, a.chan_num FROM pr_heat_hot_archive a LEFT JOIN pr_options_heat b ON b.org_id = a.org_id WHERE a.org_id = #{orgId} AND a.dtu_num = #{dtuNum} AND a.is_changed = '0'

INSERT INTO ht_tasks_perform( id, instruction_type, instruction, number, org_id, concentrator_code, device_id, meter_num, meter_id, meter_arc_code, status, instruction_status, create_time, create_by, imei, dtu_num, chan_num ) SELECT CAST(CONV(SUBSTRING(REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), 18, 14), 16, 10) AS SIGNED), 4, 0, 0, a.org_id, a.concentrator_code, a.id, a.meter_num, a.archive_id, a.meter_arc_code, 0, 0, NOW(), #{createBy}, a.imei_num, a.dtu_num, a.chan_num FROM pr_heat_unit_hot_archive a LEFT JOIN pr_options_heat b ON b.org_id = a.org_id WHERE a.org_id = #{orgId} AND a.dtu_num = #{dtuNum} AND a.is_changed = '0'
